updates.title: ITR Deadlines: A complete guide to filing, penalties, and correction windows
updates.summary: The Income Tax Department has notified ITR forms for AY 2026-27. Taxpayers can file belated, revised, or updated returns. Key deadlines for advance tax and TDS payments are crucial for compliance to avoid penalties and interest.

updates.title: Can capital gains on stocks be shown as business income to avoid tax if total income is under ₹12 lakh?
updates.summary: Reclassifying trading profits as business income may lower tax liabilities for some investors. This classification depends on factors such as trading frequency and intent. Taxpayers must consistently apply their chosen classification to avoid disputes with the Income Tax Department during audits.

updates.title: Even in heavy debt, these savings remain protected from creditors | What the law says

low_items.title: US Child Tax Credit: What to expect in 2026
low_items.summary: The Child Tax Credit provides a dollar-for-dollar reduction in tax liability for dependents under 17. The OBBB introduces a maximum credit of $2,200 per child for 2026, with unchanged income limits and specific IRS requirements for claiming.
